title: Recover Empty AGVs That Lost Tasks After an RMS Restart
summary: Restore empty AGVs after task loss caused by an RMS restart by stopping RMS, removing and re-adding AGVs without totes twice using Tote API Controls, verifying the documented HMI state when restart is involved, and then resuming RMS using the documented start procedure.
when_to_use: Use when empty AGVs have lost their tasks because the RMS was restarted.
not_for: Do not use for AGVs with totes; this candidate and source evidence are specific to empty AGVs without totes.
Do not use to assume restart readiness if AGVs are not in the documented "szonestaging" state when restart-related actions are required.

responsibilities: Perform RMS stop/resume actions described by the manual.
Remove and re-add AGVs without totes twice using Tote API Controls.
Verify AGV state on the HMI before restart-related actions.

safety_notes: This procedure includes E-stop use and system recovery actions.
If the system needs to be restarted, make sure the AGVs are in the "szonestaging" state.
The manual notes that the best practice is to shut down and restart to ensure everything is in sync.

system_preconditions: Empty AGVs have lost their tasks because the RMS was restarted.
AGVs being processed in this recovery are without totes.

visual_references.description: AGV API Controls screen used to remove and recover AGVs.
Recovery screen showing the no-empty-AGV workflow and HMI verification of "szonestaging".
System shut-down mode screen associated with startup/restart context.

steps.title: E-stop RMS
steps.purpose: Place the system into the documented stopped state before performing AGV recovery actions.
steps.expected_result: RMS is stopped so AGV recovery actions can be performed.
steps.healthy_condition: RMS is in the E-stopped/stopped condition required by the recovery procedure.
steps.failure_condition: RMS is not stopped or cannot be placed into the required stopped condition.
stop_or_escalate_if: RMS cannot be E-stopped as required by the documented recovery procedure.

steps.title: Remove and re-add empty AGVs twice
steps.purpose: Reintroduce empty AGVs that lost tasks using the documented recovery method.
steps.instruction: Remove and re-add AGVs without totes twice using the Tote API Controls referenced by the manual.
steps.expected_result: The affected empty AGVs have been removed and re-added twice through the documented controls.
steps.healthy_condition: AGVs without totes have completed the documented remove/re-add cycle twice.
steps.failure_condition: An AGV cannot be removed or re-added, or the remove/re-add cycle is not completed twice.

actions.label: Remove AGVs without totes
actions.exact_action: Remove AGVs without totes using Tote API Controls.

actions.label: Re-add AGVs without totes
actions.exact_action: Re-add AGVs without totes using Tote API Controls.

actions.label: Repeat remove and re-add
actions.exact_action: Repeat the remove and re-add sequence so AGVs without totes are removed and re-added twice.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: AGV API Controls for Remove AGV and Recover AGV functions used to remove and add AGVs back into the system.

stop_or_escalate_if: The AGV has a tote; this source-backed procedure is for AGVs without totes.
Tote API Controls needed for Remove AGV or Recover AGV are not available.
The AGV cannot be successfully removed and re-added twice.

steps.title: Verify AGVs are in "szonestaging" before restart-related actions
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented AGV state on the HMI before restart-related actions so readiness is not assumed incorrectly.
steps.instruction: If the system is to be restarted, verify on the HMI that the AGVs are in the "szonestaging" state.
steps.expected_result: The AGV state shown on the HMI is confirmed as "szonestaging" when restart-related actions are needed.
steps.healthy_condition: Affected AGVs display the "szonestaging" state on the HMI.
steps.failure_condition: Affected AGVs do not display "szonestaging" on the HMI, or their state cannot be verified.

actions.label: Check AGV state on HMI
actions.exact_action: Reference AGV state on the HMI and make sure the AGVs are in the "szonestaging" state if the system needs to be restarted.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The recovery screen context associated with verifying AGV status is "szonestaging" on the HMI.

stop_or_escalate_if: AGVs are not in the documented "szonestaging" state before restart-related actions.
AGV state cannot be verified on the HMI.

steps.title: Press the E-stop again when ready to resume
steps.purpose: Perform the documented transition step before resuming RMS.
steps.instruction: Press the E-stop again when ready to resume.
steps.expected_result: The documented pre-resume E-stop action has been completed.
steps.healthy_condition: The procedure is positioned to proceed to RMS resume per the manual sequence.
steps.failure_condition: The E-stop transition step cannot be completed or system state is not ready for resume.

actions.label: Press E-stop again
actions.exact_action: Press the E-stop again when ready to resume.

stop_or_escalate_if: System is not ready to resume after recovery actions.
Required restart-related verification has not been completed when applicable.

steps.title: Resume RMS using the documented start procedure
steps.purpose: Return the system to operation using the manual's referenced startup procedure.
steps.instruction: Resume RMS using the documented system start procedure.
steps.expected_result: RMS is resumed using the referenced starting procedure.
steps.healthy_condition: RMS resumes successfully after AGV recovery.
steps.failure_condition: RMS does not resume successfully or cannot be resumed using the documented procedure.

actions.label: Resume RMS
actions.exact_action: Resume RMS. (See "Starting the System" on page 65.)

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: System shut-down/startup context associated with restarting and resuming the system.

stop_or_escalate_if: RMS cannot be resumed using the documented start procedure.
AGVs are not in the required state for restart-related actions when applicable.

success_criteria: Empty AGVs that lost tasks have been removed and re-added twice using Tote API Controls.
When restart-related actions are involved, AGVs are verified on the HMI to be in the "szonestaging" state.
RMS is resumed using the documented system start procedure.
healthy_conditions: RMS can be placed into the required stopped state for recovery.
AGVs without totes can be removed and re-added through the documented controls.
The HMI shows AGVs in the "szonestaging" state when restart-related actions are required.
failure_conditions: RMS cannot be E-stopped or resumed as required.
Affected AGVs cannot be removed and re-added twice.
AGVs are not in the documented "szonestaging" state before restart-related actions.
The required HMI state cannot be verified.
System synchronization concerns remain after recovery actions.
escalation_guidance: Do not assume readiness if AGVs are not in the documented "szonestaging" state before restart-related actions.
If recovery does not restore synchronization, follow the manual note that best practice is to shut down and restart to ensure everything is in sync.
Escalate if RMS stop/resume actions or AGV remove/re-add actions cannot be completed with the documented controls.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Remove AGV and Recover AGV controls used during the recovery.
HMI/recovery context for verifying AGV status is "szonestaging".
System startup/shutdown context referenced for restart and resume.

missing_details: The source packet does not provide the exact control/button sequence for E-stop RMS.
The source packet does not provide the exact click-by-click Tote API Controls sequence for removing and re-adding AGVs twice.
The source packet references "Starting the System" on page 65 but does not include that procedure text in this packet.
The source packet does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source packet does not explicitly state whether production stop or LOTO is required.
